payload.text:
Create a modern, minimalist, Apple-like responsive website for a creative agency named:

ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO
(The brand name must always be written fully. Never shorten it.)

IMPORTANT TECH RULE:
This must be a STATIC marketing website only.
No AI API calls.
No backend.
No database.
No Cloud Run required.
Only HTML/CSS/JS or React (static build).
All buttons must link to external URLs (Tally form).

Goal:
Convert Instagram visitors into leads for a free Instagram audit.

Tone:
Premium, clean, confident, simple, not salesy, not flashy.
A creative studio that looks high-end but accessible.

Target audience:
Small businesses, creators, studios, restaurants and coaches who want Instagram to bring real clients, not just likes.

Primary CTA:
“Demander un audit gratuit”
(link placeholder: https://tally.so/r/XXXXXX)

Secondary CTA:
“Voir les offres” (scroll)

Structure (single-page layout):

1) HERO
- Big title: ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO
- Subtitle: “Instagram qui ramène des clients, pas juste des likes.”
- Two buttons:
  - Primary (filled): “Demander un audit gratuit”
  - Secondary (outline): “Voir les offres”
- Small trust row:
  “Process clair · Contenu qui convertit · Suivi mensuel”

2) PROBLEM
Minimal emotional block:
Title:
“Si ton Instagram…”
Bullets:
- “Ne génère pas de messages”
- “Ne crée pas de réservations”
- “Te fait perdre du temps”
Then a sentence:
“ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO transforme ton compte en vrai outil business.”

3) BENEFITS
Three columns:
- Clarté  
“Un feed cohérent qui attire ton client idéal.”
- Régularité  
“On gère le contenu. Tu valides.”
- Conversion  
“Des posts pensés pour faire passer à l’action.”

4) OFFERS
Three pricing cards:

Starter — 490€ / mois  
8 posts · 4 reels · stratégie · captions · hashtags

Growth — 990€ / mois (Most popular)  
12–16 posts · 8 reels · stratégie avancée · reporting · optimisation

UGC & Ads — dès 900€  
Vidéos UGC · contenus publicitaires · assets web · landing pages

Each card has a “Demander un audit gratuit” button.

5) TRANSFORMATION (no fake numbers)
Title: “Avant / Après”

Before:
- Posts irréguliers  
- Identité floue  
- Peu de demandes  

After:
- Feed cohérent  
- Offre claire  
- CTA et parcours client  

Add small disclaimer:
“Les résultats varient selon le secteur et la régularité.”

6) PROCESS
Three steps:
Audit → Plan → Production & optimisation

7) FAQ
Include 5 questions:
- C’est quoi un audit gratuit ?
- En combien de temps je vois des résultats ?
- Je dois fournir quoi ?
- Puis-je arrêter quand je veux ?
- Vous gérez aussi la publicité ?

8) FINAL CTA
Text:
“Prête à transformer ton Instagram en clients ?”
Button:
“Demander mon audit gratuit”

DESIGN:
- White background
- Soft violet accent color
- Rounded cards
- Large typography
- Lots of whitespace
- Apple-like look
- Fully responsive
- Mobile-first
- Sticky CTA button on mobile (“Demander un audit gratuit”)

OUTPUT:
Generate a fully working responsive static website.
No server.
No API.
Ready to be exported and deployed on Netlify, Vercel or similar.

**Defining the ENVIE Studio Site**

I'm now fully immersed in envisioning a high-end, minimalist static website for ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO, drawing inspiration from Apple's aesthetic. My primary focus is conversion, specifically driving Instagram audit leads. No AI or backend complexities; this will be a pure static React build.


**Implementing Tailwind Styling**

I've made significant progress implementing Tailwind CSS, following the aesthetic guidelines. The ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO website is taking shape, with sections defined and components like Header, Footer, and various Section components structured. I'm focusing on a clean, Apple-like look with large typography and soft violet accents on a white background. I'm leveraging `metadata.json`, `index.html`, and `index.tsx` as the core file structure and utilizing `constants.ts` for links and data. The color palette and typography choices are finalized and incorporated.

entries.description: Project metadata containing app name and description.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Inter font.
Main application component with all sections of the ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO website.

payload.text:
Create a modern, minimalist, Apple-like responsive STATIC marketing website for a creative agency named:

ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO
(The brand name must always be written fully. Never shorten it.)

IMPORTANT TECH RULE:
- STATIC marketing website only.
- No AI API calls.
- No backend.
- No database.
- No Cloud Run required.
- Only HTML/CSS/JS or React (static build).
- All buttons must link to external URLs (Tally form).
- Do not embed third-party widgets that set cookies by default.

GOAL:
Convert Instagram visitors into qualified applicants for a high-ticket monthly partnership.
No free audit, no freebie positioning.
The site must filter and qualify: ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO is selective.

POSITIONING (HIGH TICKET, “à côté de la table”):
ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO is a strategic partner, not a cheap content factory.
We work with business owners who want Instagram to generate clients.
We value clarity, standards, execution, and business outcomes.
We do NOT convince everyone; we help people self-select in or out.

TONE:
Premium, clean, confident, simple, not salesy, not flashy.
French copy, tutoiement only.
Lucid, direct, no fluff, but respectful.

TARGET AUDIENCE:
Small businesses, creators, studios, restaurants, coaches:
- already selling an offer (or ready to)
- want clients and conversions, not vanity metrics
- can validate fast and implement
- accept feedback and structure

PRIMARY CTA:
“Me qualifier”
(link placeholder: https://tally.so/r/YYYYYY)

SECONDARY CTA:
“Voir comment on bosse” (scroll)

SINGLE-PAGE STRUCTURE (one-page layout):

1) HERO
- Big title: ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO
- Subtitle: “Instagram qui ramène des clients, pas juste des likes.”
- Two buttons:
  - Primary (filled): “Me qualifier” (external Tally URL)
  - Secondary (outline): “Voir comment on bosse” (scroll)
- Small trust row:
  “Stratégie · Exécution · Conversion”
- Add a small line below:
  “On ne prend pas tout le monde. Si ce n’est pas le bon fit, on te le dira.”

2) WHO IT’S FOR / WHO IT’S NOT (core high-ticket filter)
Title: “C’est pour toi si…”
Bullets:
- “Tu veux des clients, pas juste un feed joli.”
- “Tu peux décider vite (validation, priorités, exécution).”
- “Tu acceptes une stratégie claire + des standards élevés.”
Title: “Ce n’est pas pour toi si…”
Bullets:
- “Tu cherches une recette magique / la viralité.”
- “Tu veux déléguer 100% sans t’impliquer.”
- “Tu changes d’offre toutes les semaines.”
Add a short punchline:
“On bosse avec des gens qui veulent construire un système. Pas des coups.”

3) PROBLEM (minimal, business-oriented)
Title: “Si ton Instagram…”
Bullets:
- “Ne génère pas de messages”
- “Ne crée pas de réservations”
- “Te prend de l’énergie pour rien”
Closing sentence:
“ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO le transforme en canal d’acquisition.”

4) WHAT WE DO (benefits, not deliverables)
Title: “Ce qu’on fait vraiment”
3 columns:
- Positionnement
  “On clarifie ton offre, ton angle, ton message.”
- Système de contenu
  “Un plan simple, reproductible, tenable.”
- Conversion
  “CTA, parcours client, pages et messages qui font passer à l’action.”
Add a small note:
“Moins de bruit. Plus de résultats business.”

5) THE PARTNERSHIP (cycles 3/6/9 months, no “menu”)
Title: “L’accompagnement (high ticket)”
Short intro (2 lines max):
“On bosse à côté de la table. Audit → roadmap → production → optimisation.”
Add 3 premium cards:
A) Cycle 3 mois — “Remise au carré”
- outcome sentence: “Offre claire, système propre, bases de conversion.”
B) Cycle 6 mois — “Accélération”
- outcome sentence: “Régularité, cohérence, contenu qui convertit.”
C) Cycle 9 mois — “Scaling & système”
- outcome sentence: “Process, assets, optimisation et montée en puissance.”
Under the cards add:
“Tarifs sur candidature. Cycles 3/6/9 mois. Paiement: 60% au démarrage puis mensualisation possible.”
Each card button: “Me qualifier” (external Tally URL)

6) PROCESS (simple, high-end)
Title: “Comment on bosse”
3 steps with simple icons:
- Diagnostic
- Roadmap
- Production & optimisation
Each step: 1 sentence max, direct.

7) PROOF (signals, no fake numbers)
Title: “Avant / Après”
Before:
- “Du flou”
- “Du contenu au hasard”
- “Peu de demandes”
After:
- “Une offre claire”
- “Un système simple”
- “Des CTA + un parcours”
Disclaimer:
“Les résultats varient selon le secteur, l’offre et la régularité.”

8) FAQ (high-ticket adapted)
Include 6 questions:
- C’est quoi “se qualifier” ?
- Avec qui vous travaillez ?
- Je dois fournir quoi ?
- C’est un engagement ?
- Je peux arrêter ?
- Vous faites aussi ads / landing pages ?

9) FINAL CTA (closing direct)
Text:
“Tu veux qu’Instagram devienne un canal d’acquisition ?”
Buttons:
- Primary: “Me qualifier”
- Secondary: “Voir comment on bosse” (scroll)

RGPD / LEGAL REQUIREMENTS (MUST IMPLEMENT):
- Build the website cookie-free (no trackers, no analytics that drop cookies).
- Add footer links (anchor sections on same page):
  - “Politique de confidentialité”
  - “Mentions légales”
  - Contact email placeholder: contact@enviecontentstudio.com
- Add a notice near CTAs and/or footer:
  “En cliquant, tu seras redirigée vers un formulaire Tally (prestataire externe).”
- Privacy section must state clearly:
  - The website itself does not store personal data.
  - Clicking “Me qualifier” redirects to Tally where data may be collected.
  - Data is used only to respond to the application and business contact.
  - No sale or sharing for advertising.
  - Users can request access/deletion via contact@enviecontentstudio.com
- Legal section placeholders:
  - Publisher: ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO
  - Responsible: (placeholder)
  - Hosting: (placeholder Netlify/Vercel)
  - Contact email

DESIGN REQUIREMENTS:
- White background
- Soft violet accent color
- Rounded cards
- Large typography
- Lots of whitespace
- Apple-like look
- Fully responsive, mobile-first
- Sticky mobile CTA button: “Me qualifier”
- Smooth scroll
- Accessible: semantic headings, focus states, alt text

SEO / PERFORMANCE:
- Clean HTML structure
- Basic meta tags (title, description, open graph placeholders)
- Fast loading, minimal dependencies

OUTPUT:
Generate a fully working responsive static website.
No server.
No API.
Ready to be exported and deployed on Netlify / Vercel.
Provide the full source code in one output (single HTML file or minimal React static build).

**Defining the Core Elements**

I'm now focusing on the key structural elements for the ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO website. My goal is a modern, minimalist design reminiscent of Apple's aesthetic. The website will be fully static, built for responsiveness, and in French, with "tutoiement." I'm avoiding any AI integration, backend systems, or databases.


**Refining the Website Structure**

I'm now implementing the website's structure and content, starting with the hero section and working through the "Who it's for," "What we do," and Partnership sections, as per the established outline. The primary CTA, linking to the Tally form, is integrated, and the design elements (minimalist, white, violet) are gradually being applied. I'm also ensuring the website is fully static, with React, Lucide, and Tailwind CSS. The mobile sticky CTA is the next focus. I'm removing the "Free Audit" in favor of "Me qualifier."

entries.description: Updated project metadata with the correct description for the high-ticket selective agency.
Updated HTML with proper title and meta description.
Complete rewrite of the application to match the high-ticket positioning, selective branding, and detailed structure requested (French copy, tutoiement, specific sections).

payload.text:
Create a modern, minimalist, Apple-like responsive STATIC marketing website for a creative agency named:

ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO
(The brand name must always be written fully. Never shorten it.)

IMPORTANT TECH RULE:
- STATIC marketing website only
- No AI API calls
- No backend
- No database
- Only HTML/CSS/JS or React (static build)
- All buttons link to an external Tally form
- No cookies, no trackers

GOAL:
Convert Instagram visitors into qualified applicants for a high-ticket partnership.
No free audit. No freebies. Selective positioning.

PRIMARY CTA:
“Me qualifier”
(link placeholder: https://tally.so/r/YYYYYY)

MENU:
- Comment on bosse
- L’accompagnement
- FAQ
- Me qualifier

STRUCTURE:
Hero → Pour qui / pas pour qui → Ce qu’on fait → L’accompagnement (cycles 3/6/9 mois) → Process → Avant / Après → FAQ → Final CTA

FOOTER (mandatory links):
- Politique de confidentialité → privacy.html
- Mentions légales → legal.html
- Conditions Générales de Vente → cgv.html
- contact@enviecontentstudio.com
- Notice: “Les candidatures sont effectuées via un formulaire Tally (prestataire externe).”

LEGAL PAGES (MUST BE CREATED AS SEPARATE STATIC PAGES):
- /privacy.html → insert the provided Privacy Policy text verbatim
- /legal.html → insert the provided Legal Notice text verbatim
- /cgv.html → insert the provided Terms & Conditions text verbatim

DESIGN:
- White background
- Soft violet accent
- Large typography
- Rounded cards
- Lots of whitespace
- Apple-like look
- Mobile-first
- Sticky mobile CTA: “Me qualifier”

OUTPUT:
Generate a fully working static website.
Ready to deploy on Netlify / Vercel / OVH.
Provide full source code.

**Defining the Static Site**

I'm solidifying the core architecture. It's becoming crystal clear: a modern, minimalist, Apple-inspired static site for ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO is what's needed. I'm focusing on responsiveness and ensuring no backend, database, or AI API calls are involved. All buttons will directly link to `https://tally.so`.


**Refining the Site Structure**

I'm now prioritizing the site's structure, aiming for clarity and a compelling narrative. The content will be structured as a high-ticket selective positioning, in French with tutoiement. The site will have a hero section, filters ("Pour qui / pas pour qui"), services and benefits, the engagement process (3/6/9 months), a process overview, before/after examples, an FAQ, and a final CTA. I will make sure mandatory static pages, like privacy policy and terms of service, are properly served. I plan to use React for `index.html` and have the other legal pages as separate HTML files.


**Updating Legal Pages & Footer**

I'm now implementing the legal pages: privacy policy, legal notices, and terms of service. I'm focusing on providing direct links within the footer to the HTML files, rather than using modals. I've updated the menu with "Comment on bosse", "L’accompagnement", "FAQ", and "Me qualifier" and will ensure the brand name is consistent. I have removed the "Audit" references completely, and added the notice about Tally. I'll provide placeholders. For the privacy policy, I am noting there are no cookies, that all user data are entered through Tally, and that the contact email is there for any requests.

entries.description: Update metadata for ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO selective high-ticket positioning.
Main entry point with optimized meta tags and Apple-like styling.
Full React implementation of the one-page marketing site with updated copy and selective positioning.

← Retour au site

Politique de Confidentialité

1. Données personnelles

Le site ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO est un site statique qui ne stocke aucun cookie de tracking par défaut. Aucune donnée personnelle n'est collectée directement sur ce domaine.

2. Collecte via Tally

Lorsque vous cliquez sur "Me qualifier", vous êtes redirigé vers un formulaire Tally (hébergeur externe). Les données transmises (Nom, Email, etc.) sont uniquement utilisées par ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO pour traiter votre demande de partenariat.

3. Vos droits

Conformément au RGPD, vous disposez d'un droit d'accès, de rectification et de suppression de vos données. Contactez-nous à contact@enviecontentstudio.com.

← Retour au site

Mentions Légales

Éditeur

ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO
Responsable : [Insérer Nom]
Siège social : [Insérer Adresse]

Hébergement

Le site est hébergé par [Vercel / Netlify / OVH].

Propriété intellectuelle

Tous les contenus présents sur ce site (textes, logos, design) sont la propriété exclusive de ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO. Toute reproduction est interdite sans accord préalable.

← Retour au site

Conditions Générales de Vente

1. Nature des services

ENVIE CONTENT STUDIO propose des prestations de conseil stratégique et de création de contenu pour les réseaux sociaux, vendues sous forme de cycles d'accompagnement de 3, 6 ou 9 mois.

2. Modalités de paiement

Sauf accord spécifique, un acompte de 60% est exigé au démarrage de chaque cycle. Le solde est mensualisé sur la durée du cycle.

3. Engagement

Tout cycle commencé est dû dans son intégralité. La résiliation doit être notifiée par écrit au moins 30 jours avant la fin du cycle en cours pour ne pas être renouvelé.

4. Litiges

En cas de litige, les parties s'efforceront de trouver une solution amiable avant toute action judiciaire auprès du tribunal compétent du siège social de l'agence.
